name: PointCloud-GeoLab Reviewer
description: Dependency-light reviewer environment. Open3D/ML extras are optional and not installed.
postCreateCommand: python -m pip install --upgrade pip && python -m pip install -e ".[dev,vis,bench]" && python scripts/check_devcontainer.py && python scripts/check_packaging.py
postAttachCommand: python -m pytest --version && make verify-core -n && make verify-portfolio -n
